denominator_disclosure: The exact 25 frozen source/obfuscation variants are reused, so the screened-source denominator remains 25; supplemental cases are repeated measurements, not new source-level observations.
outcome_blind_disclosure: The rules were fixed and cases were selected without reading or using any model response, score, or other model outcome; this preparer performs no model inference.
timing_disclosure: This expansion was designed after the initial 25-source full screen had started but before that screen completed.
